result.reddit_dump:
-------- POST TITLE ---------
Please share your thoughts on the Sony WH1000XM6.
Post Date: 2026-01-08 14:37:44 UTC
-------- START OF POST CONTENT ---------
Hi, I've saved up a little money and I'm planning to buy an MX6. I'd like to ask if the issue with the folding mechanism breaking has been resolved. I previously bought an XM4 And the folding part broke off.I'm using Google Translate to write this post, please bear with my English.
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
In very happy with it, love the sound and quality. The noice cancelling is insane. Does need an equalizer out of the box tho
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
not worth retail
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
Have you tried any competitors that you did think were worth retail?
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
I just went from the XM4’s to the XM6’s.  I was able to return my XM4’s for full credit and paid the difference to get the XM6’s which were on sale over the holidays.

I was a fan of the XM4’s and can say the XM6’s are noticeably better in almost every aspect..noise cancelling, sound quality, microphone call quality, and especially the transparency mode. 

I do slightly prefer the look of the XM4’s and find them to be a little more comfortable comparatively as the XM6’s have a stronger clamping force but overall those are minor quibbles in the grand scheme of things.  I also find the slightly rubbery feeling finish of the XM6’s (I have the blue color) shows oils from your skin/hair easily and have to be wiped down a little more often. 

I’m quite happy with the XM6’s.  I don’t think I would have paid full price to upgrade from my XM4’s but for the difference I did pay I think it’s worth it.
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
Best headphone I’ve ever had, XM4 was a wind sound magnet and the XM6 single-handedly fixed that
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
They are perfect. I doubt they will brake if you handle them carefully. They seem quite solid and good quality. I own both the XM4 and XM6. The improvement in microphones for outside calls is spectacular. Only for that reason, I am quite happy with them. As for noise reduction and music quality, well, it is better but not as spectacular as they claim, IMHO. I do not regret buying them, quite they are still expensive.
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
Thinking of upgrading from thr xm4 to xm6 for a few reasons primarily the mic, and anc for people's voices. Without anything playing I can still hear people talking and want to know if that is any better? 

Also how is the comfort?
-------- POST TITLE ---------
The sony wh1000xm6 is a machine
Post Date: 2025-11-19 18:09:39 UTC
-------- START OF POST CONTENT ---------
So, I'm not exactly an audiophile or anything like that (I've only had earbuds and 0.5 dollar headphones). I'm just a guy with autism who needed good noise cancellation and something big enough so I wouldn't lose it, I ended up buying the photo camera and I have to say: FUCK
Post is a link: https://i.redd.it/r4b73re8892g1.jpeg
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
Great choice! Not sure why there’s so much hate for someone buying Sony Headphones in a Sony Headphones subreddit.
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
Cus the XM5's break very easily and people are scared the XM6's break too
I got XM4s and a year(ish) in they started squeaking like hell anytime ANC was on. Tried all the fixes, nothing. It’s a pretty well documented XM4 problem. Sony didnt want to do anything about it. I then made the move to XM5s just for them to spontaneously break at the hinge. Again no support from Sony. So I’m a bit skeptical of the XM6s
Think its due to the fact of the bad rep from the XM5, the clamping force it has, and the pads not that being comfortable. 
I was originally planning on getting these too before hearing about this, but then out of nowhere the Bose Quietcomfort Ultra 2 came along and these two headphones are on par with each other in terms of ANC. 

I did get the QCU2 after trying the two out in Best Buy, but I wouldnt mind getting the XM6 at some point because I used to own the XM4 before they were worn out and the ANC started making an awful screeching sound.
I coukd tell you my reason which seems to be in line with other people's reasons but if you have read others comments and cant figure it out I dont think spelling it again would help
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
Best ANC on the market, although the 5s are still A tier. Great choice.
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
The fives have A cheap ahh hinge
Better than AirPods Max when it comes to anc?
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
Still rocking xm3’s with no wear or tear. It’s amazing how people treat their devices. It does sound like xm5’s had some kind of hinge/clasp issue.
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
Bought my XM3's first day they were available back in 2018 and have been using them daily ever since, the only wear on them is on the ear cups where my glasses come in contact with them, other than that they are just as good as the day I bought them.
Glad I’m not the only one — xm3 user here and no plans/need to upgrade.
Hey. Me as well. I have the XM3 since 2018. And they're still going strong.
Mine lost all of the leather on the earcups around 2 years ago and the battery only lasts for 3 days now but otherwise it's perfect.
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
The XM6s lowkey do feel better and sturdier than the XM5s, you'll definitely enjoy the XM6s, I've tried some samples and from my friends and gotta say, it's really good.
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
-------- TOP COMMENT ---------
Great purchase! If you don’t find the earcups very comfortable, I recommend checking out the WC PadZ on Amazon. The cushions are slightly thicker and softer than the ones that come by default. They made mine feel more premium and eliminated the discomfort during long wear sessions.
-------- TOP REPLIES FROM THE COMMENT ---------
Thank you for this! I’ve gotten used to mine now, but the first day I nearly returned them. Will check this out!

Have you experienced any weird noises in yours when ANC is activated? I get clicks and sometimes a really loud hissing noise?
